rows.finalText: The answer to "What is the next right step in my calling" seems to be living in purpose / calling territory with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with the Dog: trusted support and the steadiness it brings. When Dog appears here, it pulls your calling toward steady support, loyal alliance, and the kind of dependable help that shows whether the path can actually hold in real life. Dog opens the right path frame with the confirmation that comes from those who know you best. Present turns on the Tree, so the middle card becomes the point where the sequence can redirect. In your calling, Tree keeps returning to roots, pacing, recovery, and the long build that only shows its value over time. In terms of right path, Tree is where the sequence can turn — the slow, quiet confidence that the direction is genuinely right. What Future shows through the Bouquet: recognition, goodwill, and the momentum they create, provided the central pressure is handled honestly. In your calling, Bouquet keeps returning to a moment of goodwill, ease, or visible appreciation that makes the wider situation easier to move through. Bouquet shows where the right path question leads: the warm confirmation that this direction is right — it's being recognized. The Tree is the real hinge in this spread. The reading keeps returning to one thing: commit to steady, restorative pacing.
